title: DNA extraction from mouthwash samples
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"50qqi","text":"Set centrifuge to 4ºC","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"6apar","text":"Keep CD2 solution on ice","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"2e3gt","text":"Prepare and label collection tubes, microcentrifuge tubes, and MB spin columns","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Thaw mouthwash samples on ice for 00:30:00
Transfer desired volume into 1.5 mL or 2 mL eppendorfs 1-2 mL
Centrifuge transferred samples at maximum speed at 4 ºC for 00:10:00
Discard the supernatant carefully without disturbing the pellet
Add 800 µL C CD1 and vortex to resuspend pellet
Transfer entire eppendorf content to PowerBead Pro tubes
Secure PowerBead Pro tubes onto the bead beater and run at maximum speed for 00:05:00
Centrifuge the PowerBead Pro tubes at maximum speed for 00:01:30
Transfer the supernatant carefully without disturbing the pellet, into a clean 2 mL microcentrifuge tube
Add 200 µL CD2 into the 2 mL microcentrifuge tube and vortex for 00:00:10
Centrifuge the 2 mL microcentrifuge tube at maximum speed for 00:01:30
Transfer the supernatant carefully without disturbing the pellet, into a clean 2 mL microcentrifuge tube
Add 600 µL CD3 into the 2 mL microcentrifuge tube and vortex for 00:00:10
Load 650 µL of the lysate onto MB spin columns and centrifuge at maximum speed for 00:01:30
Discard flow-through and repeat step 13 to consume all the lysate
Place spin column onto new collection tube, add 500 µL EA, and centrifuge at maximum speed for 00:01:30
Discard flow-through and place spin column back into the collection tube
Add 500 µL C5 onto spin columns and centrifuge at maximum speed for 00:01:30
Discard flow-through and place spin column back into the collection tube
Centrifuge at maximum speed for 00:02:00 and place spin column into 1.5 mL eppendorf (elution) tube
Add 50-100 µL nuclease-free water to the center of the spin column and leave at room temperature for around 00:05:00
Centrifuge at maximum speed for 00:01:00 , quantify using Qubit, flash freeze, and store at -20/80 ºC
Repeat step 1.1 if more volume is needed to see a pellet or a high yield of DNA is required
Spin down briefly
creator: Ahmed A Shibl
